scripts.dev:
lsof -ti:3000 -ti:3002 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; BANNER='
\033[1;36m  ✔ MarkFlow Dev Servers Ready\033[0m
  ─────────────────────────────
  Web:  \033[4mhttp://localhost:3002\033[0m
  Demo: \033[4mhttp://localhost:3000\033[0m
'; (sleep 5 && printf "$BANNER") & (sleep 20 && printf "$BANNER") & turbo dev
